inputs.label: Melt Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Metal melt temperature affects gas solubility and fluidity. High temperature may increase porosity risk.

businessContext_i18n.en: Metal melt temperature affects gas solubility and fluidity. High temperature may increase porosity risk.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Metal eriyik sıcaklığı, gaz çözünürlüğünü ve akışkanlığı etkiler. Yüksek sıcaklık gözenek riskini artırabilir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Metallschmelztemperatur beeinflusst Gaslöslichkeit und Fließfähigkeit. Hohe Temperatur kann Porenrisiko erhöhen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température du métal en fusion, affecte la solubilité des gaz et la fluidité. Une température élevée peut augmenter le risque de porosité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura del metal fundido, afecta la solubilidad del gas y la fluidez. Una temperatura alta puede aumentar el riesgo de porosidad.
businessContext_i18n.ar: درجة حرارة المصهور المعدني، تؤثر على ذوبانية الغاز والسيولة. قد تزيد الحرارة العالية من خطر المسامية.

inputs.label: Mold Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Mold temperature determines solidification rate. Improper mold temperature leads to shrinkage cavities.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mold temperature determines solidification rate. Improper mold temperature leads to shrinkage cavities.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kalıp sıcaklığı katılaşma hızını belirler. Uygun olmayan kalıp sıcaklığı çekme boşluklarına yol açar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Formtemperatur bestimmt die Erstarrungsgeschwindigkeit. Ungeeignete Formtemperatur führt zu Lunkern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La température du moule détermine la vitesse de solidification. Une température de moule inappropriée entraîne des retassures.
businessContext_i18n.es: La temperatura del molde determina la velocidad de solidificación. Una temperatura inadecuada del molde provoca cavidades de contracción.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تحدد درجة حرارة القالب سرعة التصلب. قد تؤدي درجة حرارة القالب غير المناسبة إلى فراغات انكماش.

inputs.label: Injection Pressure
inputs.businessContext: Pressure ensures the metal completely fills the mold. Low pressure causes void formation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Pressure ensures the metal fills the mold completely. Low pressure causes void formation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Basınç, metalin kalıbı tam doldurmasını sağlar. Düşük basınç boşluk oluşumuna neden olur.
businessContext_i18n.de: Druck stellt sicher, dass das Metall die Form vollständig füllt. Niedriger Druck verursacht Lunkerbildung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La pression assure le remplissage complet du moule. Une pression faible provoque des vides.
businessContext_i18n.es: La presión asegura que el metal llene completamente el molde. Una presión baja provoca porosidad.
businessContext_i18n.ar: يضمن الضغط ملء القالب بالكامل. يؤدي الضغط المنخفض إلى تكوين فراغات.

inputs.label: Cooling Rate
inputs.businessContext: Rapid cooling can cause the metal to solidify before feeding and lead to micro-porosity.

businessContext_i18n.en: Rapid cooling can cause the metal to solidify before feeding, leading to micro-porosity.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hızlı soğuma, metalin besleme yapamadan katılaşmasına ve mikro boşluklara yol açabilir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Schnelle Abkühlung kann zur Erstarrung ohne Nachspeisung und zu Mikrolunkern führen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Un refroidissement rapide peut solidifier le métal avant qu'il ne puisse alimenter, créant des microporosités.
businessContext_i18n.es: Un enfriamiento rápido puede solidificar el metal antes de que alimente, generando microporos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: قد يؤدي التبريد السريع إلى تصلب المعدن دون تغذية كافية، مما يسبب فراغات دقيقة.

inputs.label: Alloy Purity
inputs.businessContext: Impurities cause gas bubbles and structural defects. As purity increases, risk decreases.

businessContext_i18n.en: Impurities cause gas bubbles and structural defects. Risk decreases as purity increases.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Safsızlıklar gaz kabarcıklarına ve yapısal kusurlara neden olur. Saflık arttıkça risk azalır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Verunreinigungen verursachen Gasblasen und Strukturfehler. Mit steigender Reinheit sinkt das Risiko.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Les impuretés provoquent des bulles de gaz et des défauts structurels. Plus la pureté est élevée, plus le risque est faible.
businessContext_i18n.es: Las impurezas causan burbujas de gas y defectos estructurales. A mayor pureza, menor riesgo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تسبب الشوائب فقاعات غازية وعيوبًا هيكلية. يقل الخطر بزيادة النقاء.

inputs.label: Ventilation Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Ventilation ensures the removal of air from the mold. Insufficient ventilation creates voids due to gas entrapment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Venting allows air to escape from the mold. Insufficient venting creates voids due to gas entrapment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Havalandırma, kalıp içindeki havanın tahliyesini sağlar. Yetersiz havalandırma gaz sıkışmasına bağlı boşluklar oluşturur.
businessContext_i18n.de: Entlüftung ermöglicht den Abtransport von Luft aus der Form. Unzureichende Entlüftung erzeugt gasbedingte Lunker.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La ventilation évacue l'air du moule. Une ventilation insuffisante crée des vides dus au gaz emprisonné.
businessContext_i18n.es: La ventilación evacua el aire del molde. Una ventilación insuficiente provoca porosidad por gas atrapado.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تضمن التهوية طرد الهواء من القالب. تؤدي التهوية غير الكافية إلى فراغات ناتجة عن احتباس الغاز.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
